brand_identity.name: APIXEL
brand_identity.mission: To propel businesses into the future with cutting-edge digital solutions.
brand_identity.aesthetic: Dark Luxury, Glassmorphism, Cyber-Future, Neon Accents

usage.h1: font-syne font-bold text-5xl md:text-7xl tracking-tight leading-tight
usage.label: font-dm-sans text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-500 font-bold

buttons.primary: bg-brand-purple hover:bg-brand-purple/90 text-white font-dm-sans font-bold py-3 px-8 rounded-full shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(147,51,234,0.5)] transition-all hover:scale-105
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-brand-cyan/30 text-brand-cyan hover:bg-brand-cyan/10 font-dm-sans font-medium py-3 px-8 rounded-full transition-all
buttons.outline: border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/5 font-dm-sans py-2 px-6 rounded-lg

cards.glass: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:border-brand-purple/50 transition-colors duration-300 relative overflow-hidden group
cards.feature: bg-brand-dark border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-6 hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,245,255,0.1)] transition-shadow

inputs.default: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder:text-slate-500 focus:border-brand-purple focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-purple focus:outline-none transition-all

universal_guidelines: Always use the 'Syne' font for headings to maintain the futuristic brand identity.
Ensure all backgrounds are dark (#020617) with high contrast text for readability.
Use glassmorphism sparingly (cards, headers) to avoid performance issues.
Implement 'framer-motion' for all major interactions to create a fluid, premium feel.
Use 'lucide-react' icons with a stroke width of 1.5 or 2px.
Ensure all images have an alt text for accessibility.
Do NOT use gradients for text unless it is a very large heading.
Maintain a 'mobile-first' approach for all layouts.
Use the specific hex codes provided for consistency.
instructions_to_main_agent: Focus on creating a high-performance, visually stunning website. Use the provided assets and color palette strictly. Implement the admin panel with a focus on usability and security. Ensure all forms have validation and feedback. Use 'sonner' for notifications. Generate a 'globals.css' file that imports the fonts and sets the base styles.
